Minecraft Java Edition version: 1.21.1
Protocol version: 767
Source project: PrismarineJS minecraft-data
Source repository: https://github.com/PrismarineJS/minecraft-data
Source license: MIT

These reviewed JSON inputs are pinned repository fixtures. Normal builds do not
download data or run the generator. Run `make generate` after an intentional
fixture update and `make verify-generated` to check committed output freshness.
